mission: Build a simple todo list web app where users can add, complete, and delete tasks
completed_issues: [vision] MVP scope and success criteria defined by Nova
[architecture] Tech stack: Next.js 16 + TypeScript + Tailwind v4 + localStorage
decisions: Static export — no backend server needed
localStorage for persistence — no auth, no database
useReducer + custom hook for state management
Tailwind CSS v4 with CSS-based config
